HA_stem.name: Hemagglutinin Stem Region
HA_stem.druggability: HIGH - Multiple bnAbs (CR6261, CR9114) validate this target
HA_stem.approach: Design small molecule or peptide that mimics bnAb binding

M2_ion_channel.name: M2 Proton Channel
M2_ion_channel.function: Acidification of viral interior during uncoating
M2_ion_channel.approach: Design next-gen M2 blocker avoiding resistance mutations
M2_ion_channel.challenge: S31N mutation confers resistance to current drugs

polymerase_PA.name: PA Endonuclease Domain
polymerase_PA.approach: Design improved PA inhibitor with broader strain coverage

PB2_cap_binding.name: PB2 Cap-Binding Domain
PB2_cap_binding.function: Binds host mRNA caps for cap-snatching
PB2_cap_binding.druggability: HIGH - Well-defined pocket with known ligands
PB2_cap_binding.approach: Design cap analog that blocks viral replication
PB2_cap_binding.challenge: Must not interfere with host cap-dependent translation

rationale: Proven druggable, conserved pore, addressable resistance mechanism
integrity_statement: This is drug design, not vaccine design. Honest about limitations.
